figures.caption: Figure 1: The pipeline of training dynamics.

Figure 2: Comparison between DMFT and numerical simulations. We plot tree observables Cθθ(α, α), Cθθ(α, 0) and m(α) as a function of the training epochs. Left panel: Numerical simulations are performed with d = dtheta = 150, g1 = 0.8, g2 = 0.8, µx(z) = µy(z) = z, η = 0.1 and Ts = 0.5 and σ = 1. Right panel: σ = 0.75 with d = 100 and Ts = 1.
